description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Windows Platform that runs on push and pull request events. Use a job matrix to test across multiple Node.js versions (14.x, 16.x, 18.x, 19.x) and Windows OS versions (2019, 2022), excluding the Node.js 14.x and Windows 2022 combination. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Node.js version, verify the Node.js installation, install dependencies with npm install, and run npm tests.
